original text:
This Hell!
government against itself: The state radical democracy Venezuela.
government against itself: The state radical democracy Venezuela.
Chavez gives this speech late <hide> where he's berating his government ministers it's his last major speech and part what he's trying lay out his legacy, and make clear what stands for.
And that speech becomes perfectly clear stands for the commune, and the development alternative form production and radical democracy that stands against the existing state.
Political theorist George Ciccariello-Maher explores the political and economic history the Venezuelan commune, from its pre-Chavez roots popular uprising against the neoliberal order, the challenges sustaining direct democracy and socialist principles the face vast demographic changes, oil market fluctuations and capitalist resistance.
George Ciccariello-Maher author and Associate Professor Politics and Global Studies Drexel University Philadelphia.

Join from Fire Earth, <hide> Mill Hollow Rd., Eureka Springs, Arkansas, for one-day work: Backyard Medicinals: Into the Wild with Steven Foster.
This the only Arkansas event have scheduled for <hide>!
For details Fire Earth’s workshop page.
Early bird registration deadline extended until April <hide>th.
$<hide>.<hide>.
After April <hide>th, $<hide>.<hide>.
Also checkout Melissa Clare’s Plant Spirit Communications event, and Lorna Trigg’s Creating Medicine Wheel Garden Fire Earth, April <hide>th.
Make weekend it.
The Ozarks have nearly <hide> species plants, which includes about <hide>% that are edible and medicinal, perhaps <hide> species.
helpful understand that different plants occur different habitats.
will look which plants you might find specific habitat.
Spring our best season for wild edibles and medicinal plants, the time when get dandelion greens, wild onions, pepper grass, plantain, pokeweed, and purslane, among others and good time year enjoy edible flowers such violets and elderflowers.
Come prepared learn, enjoy, and ask questions.
Japanese honeysuckle, some weed, medicinal plant.
segments the conservation community the question has arisen whether the possibility exists that some plants considered weeds the United States may have some kind economic value terms medicinal food use that could translate into commercial harvest, and hence opportunity control the weeds.
Japanese honeysuckle produces two major ingredients Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM).
The flowers are known jin yin hua which consists the dried, unopened buds Japanese honeysuckle.
Another product the dried stems with leaves attached known ren dong teng.
The Chinese name jin yin hua means gold and silver flower.
This refers the fact that the white flowers turn golden yellow one two days after blooming.
The Chinese name, referring the stems with the leaves attached, ren dong, means “stand winter” reference the fact that the leaves are evergreen.
more info…….well come the workshop!!!
!

You can find two new cloud free satellite image mosaics services.imagico.de now, both from areas the southern hemisphere and largely based data from the <hide>/<hide> summer season.
South Georgia subantarctic island the south Atlantic Ocean north the Antarctic peninsula.
has been mentioned the media quite lot recently due the <hide>th anniversary Ernest Shackleton’s Trans-Antarctic Expedition and the remarkable open boat journey from Elephant Island South Georgia that happened exactly <hide> years ago these days (from April May <hide>).
More information and samples can usual found services.imagico.de.
With the Sentinel-<hide>A satellite regularly delivering imagery for nearly half year now was looking for suitable area test satellite image assembly techniques Sentinel-<hide> data realistic scale.
chose the southern end the African continent for this.
This fairly obvious choice since the timespan where Sentinel-<hide> data currently available for the southern hemisphere summer, Africa routinely covered the Sentinel-<hide> acquisition plans and the cloud situation the area summer sufficiently relaxed cloud free mosaic almost possible based just one season data.
wrote almost possible since there are few smaller areas where turned Landsat imagery fill some gaps particular the northeast.
This also gave good opportunity evaluate how well combining Landsat and Sentinel-<hide> data works.
Since did not try assembling mosaic for the same area based Landsat data alone this would have been possible but there would have been relatively little practical gain course observations the ease using Sentinel-<hide> data are somewhat unreliable.
The most interesting question the larger scene size has any principal advantages disadvantages.
Normally you’d assume with larger individual images you need smaller total number images (about here) and therefore assembly easier.
But this not really the case highly automated assembly system like use.
fact with larger scenes you have more problems with cross scene inconsistencies (which are larger) and assembly more wasteful.
This from perspective makes for the other advantages larger continuous images overall assembly not easier than with Landsat.
addition the tiled structure Sentinel-<hide> data (see report this) course means additional processing work and dealing with more redundant data for large size mosaic assemblies like here.
Since the available Sentinel-<hide> base data currently very limited this mosaic while being usual standards terms cloud freeness not quite comparable Landsat mosaics terms representing vegetation maximum.
Since the imagery used summer data dedicated spring growth areas, particular the Western Cape region, appear much less green than the Green Marble.
And because the limited volume data available there also somewhat above average heterogenity appearance, visible primarily form some banding and step-like changes coloring.
Visit this mosaic’s page services.imagico.de for more information and samples.

original text:
Editor's Note: The following report the practical applications Dr. Tim and Darcy Kimmel's book, Extreme Grandparenting: The Ride Your Life, (Tyndale House Publishers, <hide>).
Realize that becoming grandparent isn’t just another season your life; it’s God-given calling.
Take full advantage the awesome opportunity influence another generation children your family.
Even though you likely have more freedom live the lifestyle you want than your own grandparents old did (better health, more money, etc.
), you share the same responsibility committed grandparents.
View your investment your grandchildren one the best investment opportunities you’ll ever have, because will pay off significant ways that have eternal value.
Don’t let the comforts and freedoms empty nest retirement cause you neglect your grandchildren.
Don’t let other noble causes (like ministry work through your church) divert too much your time and energy away from your grandchildren.
Decide stay connected, emotionally engaged, and personally involved your children’s and grandchildren’s lives.
Ask God give you clear understanding the great potential good that could occur you fully invested your grandchildren’s lives.
Ask God help you develop qualities that will make you invaluable asset your children and grandchildren: maturity, experience, perspective, willingness help out, and decision love unconditionally.
Make deliberate decision learn from life and keep growing, especially spiritually (such through reading and living out biblical truth).
Use what you’ve learned encourage and support your family members.
Approach problems with calmness and hope.
willing help your children with your grandchildren giving them time, offering them relief from their parenting duties for some much-needed breaks, serving sounding board for them try out parenting ideas (without giving them unsolicited advice), and assist them with money cases true need, God leads you.
Love your children and grandchildren much that you commit your will their needs and best interests, regardless the cost.
Model your relationship with your grandchildren God's relationship with you.
Just like God does with you, show your grandchildren kindness, love, patience, and acceptance matter what they say how they behave.
Create comfortable affinity between your heart and theirs giving them grace.
Grant them the same freedoms that God grants you: the freedom different (by refraining from passing moral judgments what they say that, while not biblically wrong, aren’t what you personally agree with), the freedom vulnerable (by making safe for them share their doubts and fears, and work their inadequacies with you), the freedom candid (by making safe for them openly and honestly share their thoughts and feelings with you), and the freedom make mistakes (by responding graciously when they do).
Give them blessing.
Bless your grandchildren whenever you can, joining their parents helping meet their three key inner needs: secure love, significant purpose, and sufficient hope.
Bless your grandchildren with secure love letting them know that you accept them they are, assuring them that you will always your best love and honor them, and giving them plenty affection (such hugs).
Bless them with significant purpose regularly affirming them, applauding the things they well, encouraging them when they’re working hard overcome challenges, giving them your attention, boosting their confidence who they are and why they matter, set clear moral boundaries give them accountability, praise them when they honor those boundaries, and lovingly correct them when they don’t.
Bless them with significant hope helping them discover the ultimate hope found relationship with Jesus; helping them recognize and develop their God-given abilities; encouraging them try new things, think their own, and stretch themselves their limits; and helping them succeed their various endeavors.
Pray for them often.
Refuse show favoritism for one grandchild over another.
Approach every point contact with your grandchildren opportunity bless them some way, spiritually, emotionally, physically.
Leave good legacy.
Realize that you’re determining your legacy every day the choices you make about how use your resources (time, energy, talents, etc.)
and how respond the various opportunities God brings your way.
Make the most your chances something good your grandchildren’s lives that will live after you die.
you have regrets over opportunities you’ve squandered the past good parent, ask God bring the healing that’s needed your own attitudes and actions, and your relationships with your children and grandchildren.
Repent your sins, seek forgiveness from God and your children, and forgive yourself after God has forgiven you.
Expect that problems your relationships with your children that took years form won’t away quickly; patient, allowing your children gradually rebuild trust you that will hopefully lead restoration.
Learn how ally your sons-in-law daughters-in-law; don’t anything that would alienate them, and everything you can build close relationships with them.
Respect your grandchildren’s parent’s standards and rules, even you disagree.
Never undermine their parenting authority the unity their marriage.
Make sure you speak positively about both them.
Bring honor your family’s reputations living with integrity, both publicly and privately.
Make decisions with eternal perspective mind.
Demonstrate what faith action looks like your grandchildren who are watching you.
Shine the light the Gospel into your grandchildren’s lives incorporating biblical truth into every part your life.
Model faithful life for them, they can clearly see the light hope dark world.
Make right moral choices and lovingly help your grandchildren develop the discernment they need make right choices themselves.
Update yourself your grandchildren’s culture, becoming informed about their movies, music, video games, fashions, etc.
they’ll know you understand their world and can speak into relevant ways.
Use your lifetime knowledge and wisdom help your grandchildren set clear course for their lives.
Help them develop these key character traits: contagious faith (by showing them how take God out box and build their whole lives around Him), consistent integrity (by showing them how the right thing even when one looking), practical poise (by helping them act appropriately various situations), personal discipline (by showing them the power self-denial and self-control achieve what they want), steadfast endurance (by helping them keep going when many others are telling them give up), and inspirational courage (by showing them how the right thing even when they’re afraid).
But you set standards, careful not push unsolicited advice your grandchildren.
Instead, earn the right heard developing close relationships with them which they’re naturally inclined ask for your advice.
your children through divorce, all you can help your grandchildren.
Find outlet for your pain and support from others you don’t add your children’s and grandchildren’s pain, don’t torture yourself with regrets and guilt, ask God give you objective perspective the situation you don’t take sides (especially around your grandchildren), let your grandchildren know that they can trust you listen without criticizing them they process their emotions, assure them that your love for them will never change despite the change their circumstances, pray for them and ask your friends pray for them well, protect your legal rights access them, let them know that the divorce wasn’t their fault and that you won’t abandon them, answer their questions, always speak positively about both their parents, and remain calm presence the midst their turmoil.
Respond wisely your grandchildren come live with you.
your grandchildren ever join your household for any reason (such when their parents are going through temporary crisis, they can’t care for them permanently), trust God help you every step the way.
Deal honestly with your disappointment from having this responsibility limit your leisure and increase your stress.
But don’t take your anger out your grandchildren; remember that they’re the innocent victims their circumstances.
Don’t make them feel guilty about the sacrifices you’re making.
Instead, welcome them warmly into your home.
Establish reasonable standards and discipline, working with your grandchildren’s parents they’re still involved their lives.
grandparent first, before acting parent, and keep hope alive that their parents will come take over their full parenting responsibilities again.
Hold the parents accountable for whatever financial and time contribution they’re capable making, and seek help from whatever assistance programs you can find from the government and charities you need it.
Ask other family members like siblings, aunts, uncles, and other grandparents pitch help.
Find support group for others your situation, and take advantage childcare and kids’ Sunday School classes through your church.
<hide>.
Love step-grandchildren and adopted grandchildren.
Respond these family members with just much love you would give traditional grandchild.
Ask God give you His perspective and view your step-grandchildren and adopted grandchildren vital parts your family.
Refuse express disappointment blame over the circumstances people who brought about your family configuration.
Give your new grandchildren plenty time figure out where you fit into their lives, and gentle with them.
Speak respectfully about the other adults their lives.
Pray for each your grandchildren often.
<hide>.
Spoil your grandchildren constructively.
While it’s great want give generously your grandchildren, sure obey two basic rules when doing so.
Make sure what you’re doing is: okay with their parents, and helping your grandchildren grown into better people.
Consider giving gifts time, character building, and prayer rather than just money things.
Don’t undermine your grandchildren’s ability learn the responsibility that comes from working hard and earning their rewards.
And don’t undermine their parents’ authority teach them that important lesson.
<hide>.
Intervene instead interfering.
Recognize that intervention becomes interference when you push you advice your children when they aren’t asking for it, when you criticize them front your grandchildren, when you undermine their authority.
Diffuse prevent tension distinguishing between morally absolute values mentioned the Bible and personal values that are simply matter preference and choosing not get upset when your grandchildren’s actions appearance don’t align with your personal values.
family crisis requires you intervene your grandchildren’s lives, sure think and pray about how best before taking action.
Ask God give you the grace you need resolve conflicts well whenever they come between you and your children grandchildren.
Don’t put pressure your children grandchildren visit you holidays like Christmas; give them the freedom work out whatever schedules are best for them.
you have grandchild with special needs, get know his her condition well and make sure your expectations for your grandchild are realistic.
willing babysit your grandchildren when you can, and your best care for them well while they’re with you.
Set clear boundaries with your grandchildren’s parents they’ll know how often and how long you’re available babysit, and you won’t feel resentful.
Before you get together with your grandchildren, have plan for how use your time with them fun and meaningful ways.
Protect your grandchildren when they visit you making sure your house safe for them (such placing medicines and cleaning solutions out reach) and making sure you’re prepared case accident (such having first aid kit hand and knowing how perform CPR).
Ask their parents let you know their schedules, needs, rituals, etc., and show respect for them.
Talk with their parents about how handle discipline whenever you need correct them for something.
Respect the parents’ rules, you don’t agree with them.
<hide>.
Connect with teenage grandchildren.
Know that you can still enjoy close relationships with your grandchildren even when they become teenagers.
Just keep mind that you should accept them for who they are, patient with them, take the initiative find out about what’s going their lives (such asking them thoughtful questions), and getting know their culture you can engage discussions that are relevant them.
<hide>.
Reach out across long distances.
you live long distance away from some all your grandchildren, keep touch often you can through e-mails, phone calls, letters, notes, exchanging digital photos, etc.
Try visit them for the celebrations and milestones their lives, like holidays, recitals, baptisms, and graduations.
Adapted from Extreme Grandparenting: The Ride Your Life, copyright <hide> Dr. Tim Kimmel and Darcy Kimmel.
Published Tyndale House Publishers, Carol Stream, Il., .
Dr. Tim Kimmel and his wife, Darcy, are cofounders Family Matters, ministry dedicated equipping families for every age and stage life, and speakers for FamilyLife ministry’s Still and Weekend Remember events.
Tim also the author several books, including Little House the Freeway and Raising Kids for True Greatness.
former radio talk show host, Tim has also appeared several radio and television programs featured guest.
received his doctor ministry degree from Western Seminary.

Use what you’ve learned encourage and support your family members.
Approach problems with calmness and hope.
willing help your children with your grandchildren giving them time, offering them relief from their parenting duties for some much-needed breaks, serving sounding board for them try out parenting ideas (without giving them unsolicited advice), and assist them with money cases true need, God leads you.
Love your children and grandchildren much that you commit your will their needs and best interests, regardless the cost.
Model your relationship with your grandchildren God's relationship with you.
Just like God does with you, show your grandchildren kindness, love, patience, and acceptance matter what they say how they behave.
Create comfortable affinity between your heart and theirs giving them grace.
Grant them the same freedoms that God grants you: the freedom different (by refraining from passing moral judgments what they say that, while not biblically wrong, aren’t what you personally agree with), the freedom vulnerable (by making safe for them share their doubts and fears, and work their inadequacies with you), the freedom candid (by making safe for them openly and honestly share their thoughts and feelings with you), and the freedom make mistakes (by responding graciously when they do).
Give them blessing.
Bless your grandchildren whenever you can, joining their parents helping meet their three key inner needs: secure love, significant purpose, and sufficient hope.
Bless your grandchildren with secure love letting them know that you accept them they are, assuring them that you will always your best love and honor them, and giving them plenty affection (such hugs).
Bless them with significant purpose regularly affirming them, applauding the things they well, encouraging them when they’re working hard overcome challenges, giving them your attention, boosting their confidence who they are and why they matter, set clear moral boundaries give them accountability, praise them when they honor those boundaries, and lovingly correct them when they don’t.
Bless them with significant hope helping them discover the ultimate hope found relationship with Jesus; helping them recognize and develop their God-given abilities; encouraging them try new things, think their own, and stretch themselves their limits; and helping them succeed their various endeavors.
Pray for them often.
Refuse show favoritism for one grandchild over another.
Approach every point contact with your grandchildren opportunity bless them some way, spiritually, emotionally, physically.
Leave good legacy.
Realize that you’re determining your legacy every day the choices you make about how use your resources (time, energy, talents, etc.)
and how respond the various opportunities God brings your way.
Make the most your chances something good your grandchildren’s lives that will live after you die.
you have regrets over opportunities you’ve squandered the past good parent, ask God bring the healing that’s needed your own attitudes and actions, and your relationships with your children and grandchildren.
Repent your sins, seek forgiveness from God and your children, and forgive yourself after God has forgiven you.
Expect that problems your relationships with your children that took years form won’t away quickly; patient, allowing your children gradually rebuild trust you that will hopefully lead restoration.
Learn how ally your sons-in-law daughters-in-law; don’t anything that would alienate them, and everything you can build close relationships with them.
Respect your grandchildren’s parent’s standards and rules, even you disagree.
Never undermine their parenting authority the unity their marriage.
Make sure you speak positively about both them.
Bring honor your family’s reputations living with integrity, both publicly and privately.
Make decisions with eternal perspective mind.
Demonstrate what faith action looks like your grandchildren who are watching you.
Shine the light the Gospel into your grandchildren’s lives incorporating biblical truth into every part your life.
Model faithful life for them, they can clearly see the light hope dark world.
Make right moral choices and lovingly help your grandchildren develop the discernment they need make right choices themselves.
Update yourself your grandchildren’s culture, becoming informed about their movies, music, video games, fashions, etc.
they’ll know you understand their world and can speak into relevant ways.
Use your lifetime knowledge and wisdom help your grandchildren set clear course for their lives.
Help them develop these key character traits: contagious faith (by showing them how take God out box and build their whole lives around Him), consistent integrity (by showing them how the right thing even when one looking), practical poise (by helping them act appropriately various situations), personal discipline (by showing them the power self-denial and self-control achieve what they want), steadfast endurance (by helping them keep going when many others are telling them give up), and inspirational courage (by showing them how the right thing even when they’re afraid).
But you set standards, careful not push unsolicited advice your grandchildren.
Instead, earn the right heard developing close relationships with them which they’re naturally inclined ask for your advice.
your children through divorce, all you can help your grandchildren.
Find outlet for your pain and support from others you don’t add your children’s and grandchildren’s pain, don’t torture yourself with regrets and guilt, ask God give you objective perspective the situation you don’t take sides (especially around your grandchildren), let your grandchildren know that they can trust you listen without criticizing them they process their emotions, assure them that your love for them will never change despite the change their circumstances, pray for them and ask your friends pray for them well, protect your legal rights access them, let them know that the divorce wasn’t their fault and that you won’t abandon them, answer their questions, always speak positively about both their parents, and remain calm presence the midst their turmoil.
Respond wisely your grandchildren come live with you.
your grandchildren ever join your household for any reason (such when their parents are going through temporary crisis, they can’t care for them permanently), trust God help you every step the way.
Deal honestly with your disappointment from having this responsibility limit your leisure and increase your stress.
But don’t take your anger out your grandchildren; remember that they’re the innocent victims their circumstances.
Don’t make them feel guilty about the sacrifices you’re making.
Instead, welcome them warmly into your home.
Establish reasonable standards and discipline, working with your grandchildren’s parents they’re still involved their lives.
grandparent first, before acting parent, and keep hope alive that their parents will come take over their full parenting responsibilities again.
Hold the parents accountable for whatever financial and time contribution they’re capable making, and seek help from whatever assistance programs you can find from the government and charities you need it.
Ask other family members like siblings, aunts, uncles, and other grandparents pitch help.
Find support group for others your situation, and take advantage childcare and kids’ Sunday School classes through your church.
<hide>.
Love step-grandchildren and adopted grandchildren.
Respond these family members with just much love you would give traditional grandchild.
Ask God give you His perspective and view your step-grandchildren and adopted grandchildren vital parts your family.
Refuse express disappointment blame over the circumstances people who brought about your family configuration.
Give your new grandchildren plenty time figure out where you fit into their lives, and gentle with them.
Speak respectfully about the other adults their lives.
Pray for each your grandchildren often.

Spoil your grandchildren constructively.
While it’s great want give generously your grandchildren, sure obey two basic rules when doing so.
Make sure what you’re doing is: okay with their parents, and helping your grandchildren grown into better people.
Consider giving gifts time, character building, and prayer rather than just money things.
Don’t undermine your grandchildren’s ability learn the responsibility that comes from working hard and earning their rewards.
And don’t undermine their parents’ authority teach them that important lesson.

Intervene instead interfering.
Recognize that intervention becomes interference when you push you advice your children when they aren’t asking for it, when you criticize them front your grandchildren, when you undermine their authority.
Diffuse prevent tension distinguishing between morally absolute values mentioned the Bible and personal values that are simply matter preference and choosing not get upset when your grandchildren’s actions appearance don’t align with your personal values.
family crisis requires you intervene your grandchildren’s lives, sure think and pray about how best before taking action.

Don’t put pressure your children grandchildren visit you holidays like Christmas; give them the freedom work out whatever schedules are best for them.
you have grandchild with special needs, get know his her condition well and make sure your expectations for your grandchild are realistic.
willing babysit your grandchildren when you can, and your best care for them well while they’re with you.
Set clear boundaries with your grandchildren’s parents they’ll know how often and how long you’re available babysit, and you won’t feel resentful.
Before you get together with your grandchildren, have plan for how use your time with them fun and meaningful ways.
Protect your grandchildren when they visit you making sure your house safe for them (such placing medicines and cleaning solutions out reach) and making sure you’re prepared case accident (such having first aid kit hand and knowing how perform CPR).
Ask their parents let you know their schedules, needs, rituals, etc., and show respect for them.
Talk with their parents about how handle discipline whenever you need correct them for something.
Respect the parents’ rules, you don’t agree with them.

Connect with teenage grandchildren.
Know that you can still enjoy close relationships with your grandchildren even when they become teenagers.
Just keep mind that you should accept them for who they are, patient with them, take the initiative find out about what’s going their lives (such asking them thoughtful questions), and getting know their culture you can engage discussions that are relevant them.

Reach out across long distances.
you live long distance away from some all your grandchildren, keep touch often you can through e-mails, phone calls, letters, notes, exchanging digital photos, etc.
Try visit them for the celebrations and milestones their lives, like holidays, recitals, baptisms, and graduations.
Adapted from Extreme Grandparenting: The Ride Your Life, copyright <hide> Dr. Tim Kimmel and Darcy Kimmel.
Published Tyndale House Publishers, Carol Stream, Il., .
Dr. Tim Kimmel and his wife, Darcy, are cofounders Family Matters, ministry dedicated equipping families for every age and stage life, and speakers for FamilyLife ministry’s Still and Weekend Remember events.
Tim also the author several books, including Little House the Freeway and Raising Kids for True Greatness.
former radio talk show host, Tim has also appeared several radio and television programs featured guest.

From the DJFL HOME Page, click Edit Account the bottom the left hand menu.
Follow the instructions the next page and then click your name edit your information.
Make sure the check box "no emails" NOT checked and make sure all the email addresses you want receive notices are there.
Put semicolon and space between email addresses.
sure click the Submit button when you are done.
Ideally, you want add BOTH parents when setting the player account.
add guardian later, scroll the bottom player record (see above for the Edit Account instructions) and click the box “clone adult” and then enter the name the guardian, cell phone and email address (and any other information that different from the player.
You can delete the DOB and Grade).
sure click the Submit button when you are done.
<hide>-Be sure that the "NO EMAILS" box NOT checked off.

Edison World School Abu Dhabi information page.

What load Horse Dump!
Meinkrys wrote: Offer was valid after paid $<hide>USD for Visa fee, goat fee, fee fee, tax fee..Etc.
Thanks for posting here and alerting other readers the teaching job scam.
really stings lose that money.
don't know any easy ways get that money back.
There have been many similar stories about other job scams the UAE and I've not heard any where someone got their money back.
TL;DR version information below: The Edison World School Abu Dhabi currently found online does not exist real life, and example common scam where someone advertises teaching jobs schools the UAE which don't exist.
The scam that when offer made, money requested pay for visa processing fees.
Never send money for visa fees any employer agency the UAE.
employer agency asks for money, assume scam, the employer unpleasant work for they really exist.
Edison World School was officially announced <hide> school planned for Abu Dhabi but nothing further developed.
appears that someone someones have either read that announcement and used that name for scam, set scam which coincidentally has the same name the proposed school.
seems unlikely that the organisation which made the original announcement involved the teaching job scam.
what appears the official school website, however copied from the Repton School Abu Dhabi website (Repton real school), with Repton School replaced Edison School Edison World School, and some other adjustments for address, location, staff names etc.
The fake EWS website even has photos Repton School Derbyshire, relabeled photos EWS.
Repton Abu Dhabi website wrote: For those families relocating back the UK, considering Boarding for their child, both Repton and Foremarke Hall (Repton's preparatory school) offers continuity curriculum and culture.
EWS website wrote: For those families relocating back the UK, considering Boarding for their child, both Edison World School and Foremarke Hall (Edison World School's preparatory school) offers continuity curriculum and culture.
The headteacher EWS according their website Bianca Anna Gabriel (or Ana).
Whoever she (independent confirmation not found), the photo the website different person, Tammie McKenzie, who principal (previously assistant principal) Carroll High School, part the Carroll Community School District the city Carroll Iowa, USA.
She still there far can tell (according her website, her LinkedIn page, and the school website), and probably doesn't know about her doppelganger Abu Dhabi.
There are three (or more) Edison World School domains.
currently used for the school website.
Whois data shows was first registered Sep <hide>.
was previously used for the school website but now just spam, possibly still used for emails.
Don't visit, loads another noisy spam website.
Whois data shows was first registered Aug <hide>.
Repton School Abu Dhabi website has popup warning (they don't name the fake school though).
Repton Abu Dhabi website wrote: has come our attention there fake organisation sending offer letters prospective employees with the Repton Abu Dhabi branding.
would like inform you that Repton Abu Dhabi way affiliated with this organisation.
Repton Abu Dhabi would never ask candidate for fee for position the school.
Please vigilant when receiving offer letters from third party organisations.
 (website content longer available directly) was used for EWS but website was copied from the Mayoor Indian School Abu Dhabi real school), with Find and Replace done the Mayoor school name.
Whois data shows was first registered May <hide> which seems anomaly given that Google has record the website saved before that date, for example Nov <hide> for the page Possible explanation that Google took the date from the page rather than actually retrieving the page that date, since the page (which EWS copied) also has the date Nov <hide> recorded Google.
Principal Headteacher's name given website Yogita Anna.
Welcome Mayoor Private School LLC Abu Dhabi.
This school has been set collaboration with the <hide> year old Mayo College General Council(MCGC, India) which has long standing tradition excellence occupied with caring, stimulating and open ethos.
Welcome Edison World School Abu Dhabi.
